title: AI Agent node references unexecuted nodes
symptom: When triggering a workflow with multiple schedules, the AI Agent throws an error if it references a node that did not execute during that run.
not_this_if: All referenced nodes executed in the current run
root_cause: The AI Agent node requires data from all referenced nodes to function correctly. If a node does not execute, the AI Agent cannot retrieve the necessary data, leading to an error.
fix_steps: Use a fallback in the expression for the AI Agent: {{ $(‘f1’).item.json.test1  ‘’ }} {{ $(‘f2’).item.json.test2  ‘’ }}
Alternatively, wire both function nodes into a Merge node and connect the Merge node to the AI Agent.
agent_instruction: Implement a Merge node or use fallback expressions in the AI Agent's prompt.
